languages.text: {n}Юноша сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Сердце... вернете... Заслужу... право трудиться..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
languages.original_text: {n}Юноша сотрясается всем телом, после чего резко замирает. Судорожно всхлипывая, он шепчет с глупой улыбкой.{/n} "Сердце... вернете... Заслужу... право трудиться..."

traits.locale_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
"Will the pain... go away? Will you give... my heart back? I'll earn... the right to work again..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
{n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."

languages.text: 「この痛みは消えるのか。私の心は戻ってくるのか。私はまだ...働く権利があるのか」
languages.original_text: "Will the pain go? Will my heart come back? Will I still... have the right to work?"

traits.locale_text: 「この痛みは消えるのか。私の心は戻ってくるのか。私はまだ...働く権利があるのか」

languages.text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“你会……把我的心脏还回来……我会……重新获得工作的资格……”
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."

traits.locale_text: {n}他全身颤抖了一下，然后猛地僵住。他一边抽泣，一边带着痴傻的笑容低声说：{/n}“你会……把我的心脏还回来……我会……重新获得工作的资格……”

languages.text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « Vous me rendrez... mon cœur... J'obtiendrai le droit... de travailler à nouveau... »
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Il est pris de frissons, puis se fige soudain. Sanglotant, il murmure, un sourire sans joie sur les lèvres :{/n} « Vous me rendrez... mon cœur... J'obtiendrai le droit... de travailler à nouveau... »

languages.text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «Me devolverá... mi corazón... Recuperaré... el derecho a trabajar...».
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Su cuerpo se estremece, después queda inmóvil repentinamente. Sollozando, susurra con una sonrisa embobada:{/n} «Me devolverá... mi corazón... Recuperaré... el derecho a trabajar...».

languages.text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "Kalbimi... Geri vereceksin... Yeniden çalışma... Hakkını kazanacağım..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bütün vücudu ürperiyor, ardından aniden donakalıyor. Hıçkırarak, aptalca bir gülümsemeyle fısıldıyor.{/n} "Kalbimi... Geri vereceksin... Yeniden çalışma... Hakkını kazanacağım..."

languages.text: {n}Sein ganzer Körper erzittert, ehe er plötzlich erstarrt. Schluchzend flüstert er mit einem freudlosen Lächeln:{/n} "Ihr gebt mir ... mein Herz zurück ... Dann werde ich ... wieder arbeiten dürfen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}His whole body shudders, then freezes abruptly. Sobbing, he whispers with a witless smile,{/n} "You'll give... my heart back... I'll earn... the right to work again..."
